stemHtml: When cargo, unaccompanied baggage, or stores are unloaded at an international airport other than the intended destination, and the Contracting State is satisfied there is a valid reason…

options.a: it shall not impose penalties, fines, customs duties, or taxes on the operator.
options.b: it shall not impose penalties or fines but may impose customs duties and taxes.
options.c: it shall not impose penalties, fines, or customs duties but may impose taxes.
options.d: it shall not impose penalties, fines, or taxes but may impose customs duties.
